calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-10-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Nathaniel L. Dunn, Esq. appeared for plaintiff State Bar of California, a Public corporation.
No appearance by William L. Sundbeck, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on January 28, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 16, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 16, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff State Bar of California, a Public corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant William L. Sundbeck, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $16,915.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,610.54.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $20,525.54.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
